decisions.name: Functional Requirements
decisions.rationale: [{'title': 'submitting the CV', 'description': 'Applicants submit their CVs for parsing and analysis.', 'source': {'page': 16, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'viewing and editing the CV', 'description': 'Applicants can view and edit their parsed CV.', 'source': {'page': 16, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'answering screening questions', 'description': 'Applicants are presented with screening questions defined by an expert recruiter.', 'source': {'page': 12, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'getting a rating for the submitted CV', 'description': 'The system generates a percentage-based result, providing a fair evaluation of each applicant.', 'source': {'page': 13, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}]

decisions.name: Non-Functional Requirements
decisions.rationale: [{'title': 'Performance', 'description': 'The system MUST respond within a reasonable time frame.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Reliability', 'description': 'The system SHALL be available at least 99.9% of the time.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Security', 'description': 'The system MUST protect user data and prevent unauthorized access.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Privacy', 'description': 'The system SHALL ensure that user data is collected and stored in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Scalability', 'description': 'The system SHOULD be able to handle a large number of users and CVs without a significant decrease in performance.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Usability', 'description': 'The system MUST be easy to use and navigate for users with varying levels of technical expertise.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Maintainability', 'description': 'The system SHOULD be designed to be easily maintained and updated by the development team.', 'source': {'page': 21, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Compatibility', 'description': 'The system MUST be compatible with a variety of devices and browsers.', 'source': {'page': 22, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}, {'title': 'Integration', 'description': 'The system SHOULD be able to integrate with other HR systems and tools.', 'source': {'page': 22, 'start_index': None}, 'project_id': 'proj_d326da84'}]

components.name: CVViewer
components.responsibility: Displays the parsed CV to applicants for viewing and editing

components.name: ScreeningQuestionManager
components.responsibility: Manages screening questions and presents them to applicants

components.name: RatingEngine
components.responsibility: Generates a percentage-based result to evaluate each applicant's CV

components.name: Database
components.responsibility: Stores and retrieves CV data, screening questions, and ratings

components.name: APIGateway
components.responsibility: Handles incoming requests and routes them to the appropriate components

components.name: Security
components.responsibility: Ensures secure authentication and authorization for applicants and recruiters

runtime_flow.action: Generate rating based on parsed CV
